_publications._publicationTitle: A High-Throughput Screening Platform Identifies Novel Combination Treatments for Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors
_publications._context: significantly reduced tumor growth in a sporadic PDOX model (MPNST-SP-01; sevenfold)

basicInfo.description: Sporadic MPNST patient-derived orthotopic xenograft (PDOX) maintained in athymic nude mice; used in high-throughput drug combination screening
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Hereditary Cancer Program, Catalan Institute of Oncology, IDIBELL and CIBERONC
